response:
I want 10 weaknesses of a company from 2023, and I want the 10 points to be similar to this example format:

1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from [Year] to [Year].  
2. [Company Name]'s EPS decreased by [$X] in [Year] from the previous year.  
3. [Company Name]'s share prices dropped [X]% from [Year] to [Year].  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product or service.  
5. Total liabilities increased from [$X] to [$X] from [Year] to [Year].  
6. [Company Name] produced [X]% fewer units of [Product] in the first half of [Year] due to weak demand from [Industry/Market] caused by [Event].  
7. [Competitor Name] [Achieved/Improved] [Something] in [Year]. [Company Name] has no [Similar Offering/Feature].  
8. [Competitor Name] achieved its goal to [Achievement] by [Date]. [Company Name] has no [Similar Achievement/Feature].  
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during fiscal year [Year].  
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from [Type of Lawsuit 1] to [Type of Lawsuit 2].
